changelog:
# CHANGELOG for Firmware Release v12 - ESP32C3
## ✨ New Features
* Added support for Matter protocol over Wi-Fi and Ethernet
* Implemented device provisioning using QR code scanning
* Enhanced user interface for device configuration and management

## 🐛 Bug Fixes
* Fixed issue with device rebooting unexpectedly during OTA updates
* Resolved bug causing incorrect reporting of device battery levels
* Corrected issue with device failing to connect to Wi-Fi networks with WPA3 encryption

## 🔐 Security
* Conducted security audit and detected 2 potential secrets in the codebase
* Noted a security score of 3/10, indicating areas for improvement
* Verified that no critical CVEs are present in the current release

## ⚡ Performance
* Optimized flash usage to 43.9%, with potential savings of 95 KB
* Improved device boot time by reducing unnecessary initialization steps
* Enhanced overall system performance by optimizing task scheduling

## 🔍 Code Quality
* Generated 4 new tests to improve code coverage and ensure functionality
* Conducted code review to identify areas for improvement and refactoring
* Applied coding standards and best practices to ensure consistency

## ✅ Quality Gates
* Successfully passed build process with no errors or warnings
* Verified that all tests passed with no failures or exceptions
* Confirmed that AI patches are not required for this release

## ⚠️ Known Issues
* Device may experience connectivity issues with certain Wi-Fi networks
* Matter protocol support is still in experimental phase and may have limitations
* Security score indicates potential vulnerabilities that need to be addressed

## 🔜 Next Release
* Plan to address security vulnerabilities and improve security score
* Implement additional features and enhancements for Matter protocol support
* Optimize device performance and reduce flash usage further
